case_title: HAYES STREET-GOUGH ASSOCIATES vs. HURON, JIM et al

docket_entries.description: JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-08-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
N/A BY DEFTS AT SETTL CONF IN DEPT 1 - JURY DEMANDS STRICKEN

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN/CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY BRENDA CRUZ KEITH PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFTS E. LINS AND J. HURON PRESENT IN PRO-PER. DEFT ORAL MOT/CONT DUE TO ILLNESS OF DEFTS DENIED. COURT DISCUSSES SETTLEMENT WITH PARTIES; DEFT LINS AGREES TO SETTLEMENT AND TERMS PLACED ON RECORD. DEFT HURON DECLINES AND COURT TRIAL COMMENCED AS TO DEFT HURON ONLY. AFTER TRIAL COMMENCED BY PLTF, DEFT HURON WISHES TO SETTLE CASE. IDENTICAL TERMS ARE PLACED ON RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP SIGNED BY PARTIES & JUDGMNT. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTF.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES EXCEPT FOR DEFENDANT JAMES HURON FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HURON, JIM LINS, ELMAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 417 GOUGH STREET #401, ALSO KNOWN AS 321 IVY STREET, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN ATNYS FEES & COSTS. DEFTS TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 1-31-96 BUT SHALL HAVE TO END OF DAY TO REMOVE BELONGINGS. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS. PLTF TO REFUND TENANT'S PORTION OF SEC DEPOSIT. IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WILL PERPARE ORDER TO SET ASIDE JMNT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
